prerequisites: A TikTok for Business account with access to the TikTok Marketing (Business) API.
A registered developer app in the TikTok Business API portal, which provides the App ID (app_id) and Secret used to authorize the connection.
An access token (access_token) authorized for your TikTok advertiser account, obtained through the TikTok Business API authorization flow.
A start_date marking the earliest data to sync (the connector also accepts an optional end_date to bound the sync window).

authMethods.name: TikTok Business API access token (developer app credentials)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the credentials of a registered TikTok Business API developer app. Supply the App ID (credentials.app_id), the app Secret (credentials.secret), and an authorized access token (credentials.access_token). The access token is issued through TikTok's Business API authorization flow and grants the connector access to the advertiser data the token was authorized for.

setupSteps.title: Register a developer app in the TikTok Business API portal
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the TikTok for Business / Business API developer portal and create (or open) a developer app. Note the app's App ID and Secret, which the connector requires as credentials.app_id and credentials.secret.

setupSteps.title: Authorize the app and obtain an access token
setupSteps.body: Complete TikTok's Business API authorization flow for the advertiser account you want to sync. This produces an access token. Provide it to the connector as credentials.access_token alongside the app_id and secret.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync window
setupSteps.body: Configure start_date to define the earliest data to pull. Optionally set end_date to cap the sync at a specific date; leave it empty to sync up to the present.

setupSteps.title: Tune optional reporting parameters
setupSteps.body: Adjust the optional fields as needed: report_granularity controls the reporting time grain, attribution_window sets the conversion attribution window, and include_deleted determines whether deleted entities (such as paused or removed campaigns/ads) are included in the sync.
